corrections.note: The opening clause of v. 14, 'ἐλθάτωσαν αἱ πάροικοι', is omitted; the printed page has it on line 1 after ἐπέβησαν.
Body prints δυνατὴ (lemma); δύναμαι is the A variant recorded in the apparatus ('δυνατη] δυναμαι A').
Printed form is βαδίζετε (ζ + ε); transcription reads ξ and drops the ε in both occurrences.
Page prints οἱ τρυφεροί μου (the word wraps as τρυ-|φεροί); transcription mis-split as γὰρ|τρεφοί.
Opening sigla are Latin AQ (Alexandrinus + Marchalianus), transcribed as Greek ΑΩ.

uncertain.note: Cannot confirm whether B* lemma reads 'ρευθησας' or 'ρευθησαν' at this resolution.
Parenthetical after 'sup ras Bᵃ' may be 'salt' (saltem) rather than 'sall'.
